title: aleuritopteris henryi
intro: Aleuritopteris henryi, also known as Chinese glutinous fern or Henry's leather fern, is a type of plant species in the family Matoniaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, anti-oxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Aleuritopteris henryi include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestive health, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Aleuritopteris henryi can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine to create medicinal tonics and ointments.
